message:
chore: add ephemeral patterns to .gitignore

Ignore per-agent Cargo caches (.cargo_*/), remote compilation helper
cache (.rch/), agent mail SQLite databases (storage.sqlite3*), and
beads backup files (.beads/*.bak*) that accumulate during multi-agent
development sessions and should never be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -95,3 +95,16 @@ docs/formal/*.tlc.log
 
 # WezTerm Automata runtime state (backups, locks)
 .wa/
+
+# Per-agent Cargo caches (concurrent agent builds use isolated registries)
+.cargo_*/
+
+# Remote compilation helper cache
+.rch/
+
+# Agent mail SQLite databases (runtime state, not project data)
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-*
+
+# Beads backup files (auto-generated during sync/migration)
+.beads/*.bak*
